sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 191 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22. 2. For orders on CMA No.1251/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 25.02.2026 Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Per learned counsel, question framed for determination has already been decided against the applicant department by virtue of judgment dated 22.08.2022 passed in SSTRA 2500 of 2015 He states that the CPLA there against being CPLA 1091- K/2022 has already been dismissed by the honourable Supreme Court on 15.01.2025. Therefore, in view hereof, the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
